## Summary

Fixture PR body for B1 — uses `**Tests**:` format with no "pass"/"green" keywords.
v0.18.0 P1 regex `(npm test|tests?.*(pass|green))` would silently miss this format.

## Quality gates

**Tests**: 4094/4094 ✓
**Lint**: 0 errors ✓
**Build**: clean ✓

- Workflow: 2/3
